notes: Exchange courses are part of the regular English CBS programme offerings
Project score based on broad graduate and CEMS course availability
Approximately 1,400 exchange students annually plus buddy and social programmes
CBS offers housing support but accommodation is limited and allocation is not guaranteed
Courses for exchange students are offered through English programmes; daily-life friendliness is partly a project judgement
EU citizens can enter and begin studying without a student visa; residence documentation may still be needed
